title: Random_spawn
description: The plugin creates a random spawn when you first log into the server.
body:
**With this plugin, you can find yourself at any coordinates the first time you log in.
This mod is suitable for almost all servers.**

# You can also change the random spawn distance.
max-coordinate: your coodrinates
min-safe-distance: your coodrinates
welcome-message: "§aYour messege"
